data.content:
Use the `--framework` flag:

```
dotnet test --framework net9.0
```

This restricts the test run to the `net9.0` target only, skipping `net8.0`. I ran it against your project and it built and executed successfully against `net9.0`. Note: no tests were discovered — you may need to verify your test adapter packages are referenced correctly.
